title: CottageCoreCraft
description: A minimal Create+Seasons+Farming Modpack with some optimization sprinkled in.
body:
A minimal Create+Seasons+Farming Modpack with some optimization sprinkled in. 

Made for our little personal CottageCore SMP, but freely available to anyone who wants to use it.

### Content Mods
---
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/Xbc0uyRg)
- [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/4EakbH8e)
- [Fabric Seasons](https://modrinth.com/mod/KJe6y9Eu)
- [Fabric Seasons: Delight Compat](https://modrinth.com/mod/4VYO7ir0)
- [Create: Steam 'n' Rails](https://modrinth.com/mod/ZzjhlDgM)

### Optimization
---
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/gvQqBUqZ)
- [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/Orvt0mRa)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/AANobbMI)
- [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/YL57xq9U)
---

 <3 Molly
